name: molgenis-emx2-directory-client

metadata.name: molgenis-emx2-directory-client
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: GNU Lesser General Public License v3 (LGPLv3)
metadata.summary: MOLGENIS EMX2 Python tooling for a BBMRI Biobank Directory

documentation:
# molgenis-emx2-directory-client

MOLGENIS EMX2 Python tooling for a BBMRI Biobank Directory

## Description
This library contains tools for the MOLGENIS EMX2 BBMRI Biobank Directory that help with
staging and publishing the data of the national nodes. **Staging** is the process of copying
data from a national node's external server (for example [BBMRI-NL](https://catalogue.bbmri.nl/menu/main/home)) to
the staging area on the Directory server. Not all national nodes have external servers; these
do not need to be staged. **Publishing** is the process of copying and combining the data from the staging areas
to the public combined tables of the Directory.

## Usage

These tools can be used as a library in a script. Start by installing the library with
`pip install molgenis-emx2-directory-client`.

For an example of how to use this library to stage and publish nodes, see [`dev.py`](dev/dev.py).

If you just want to retrieve the data of a node for another purpose, you can use the `DirectorySession`
and `ExternalServerSession` directly:

```python
from molgenis-emx2.directory-client import DirectorySession, ExternalServerSession
from molgenis-emx2.directory-client import NodeData

# Get the staging and published data of NL from the directory
async def get_data():
    # Set up the logger
    logging.basicConfig(level="INFO", format=" %(levelname)s: %(name)s: %(message)s")
    logging.getLogger("requests").setLevel(logging.WARNING)
    logging.getLogger("urllib3").setLevel(logging.WARNING)

    # Login to the directory with a DirectorySession
    with DirectorySession(url="<DIRECTORY_URL>", schema="<DIRECTORY_SCHEMA>") as session:
        # Apply the 'signin' method with the username and password
        session.signin(username, password)

        nl = session.get_external_node("NL")
        nl_staging_data: NodeData = session.get_staging_node_data(nl)
        nl_published_data: NodeData = session.get_published_node_data(nl)

        # Get the data from the external server of NL
        external_session = ExternalServerSession(nl)
        nl_external_data: NodeData = external_session.get_node_data()

    # Now you can use the NodeData objects as you wish
    for person in nl_external_data.persons.rows:
        print(person)

if __name__ == "__main__":
    asyncio.run(get_data())
```


## For developers
Clone the `molgenis-emx2` repository from GitHub
```console
git clone git@github.com:molgenis/molgenis-emx2.git
```

Change the working directory to `.../tools/directory`

This project uses [pre-commit](https://pre-commit.com/) and [pipenv](https://pypi.org/project/pipenv/) for the development workflow.
Install pre-commit and pipenv if you haven't already:
```
pip install pre-commit
pip install pipenv
```

Install the git commit hooks:
```
pre-commit install
```

Create an environment and install the package including all (dev) dependencies:
```
pipenv install --dev
```

Enter the environment:
```
pipenv shell
```

Build and run the tests:
```
tox
```

## Build
Before building the source, the package `bumpversion` needs to be installed.
```console
(venv) $ pip install bumpversion
```

Bump the source version. This will update setup.py and __init__.py
Always start with creating a new -dev0 version with major, minor or patch parameter  
depending on the release scope
```console
(venv) $ ./bumpversion major
OR
(venv) $ ./bumpversion minor
OR
(venv) $ ./bumpversion patch
```

Then either create a new dev-version in case any changes have been made
```console
(venv) $ ./bumpversion build
```

Or if all is fine, create a new release version
```console
(venv) $ ./bumpversion release
```

After bumping the version, the source can be build
```console
(venv) $ tox -e build
```

Then dev (and release) versions of the source can be uploaded to testpypi
```console
(venv) $ tox -e publish -- --skip-existing --repository testpypi
```

And release versions of the source can be uploaded to pypi
```console
(venv) $ tox -e publish -- --skip-existing --repository pypi
```

Or install locally
```console
(venv) $ pip install dist/molgenis_emx2_pyclient*.whl
```

## Note

This project has been set up using PyScaffold 4.0.2. For details and usage
information on PyScaffold see https://pyscaffold.org/.

functions.name: molgenis_emx2.directory_client.errors.requests_error_handler
documentation: Decorator that catches RequestExceptions and wraps them in a DirectoryError.

classes.name: molgenis_emx2.directory_client.errors.DirectoryWarning
documentation:
Class that contains a warning message. Use this when a problem occurs that
shouldn't cancel the current action (for example staging or publishing).

classes.name: molgenis_emx2.directory_client.errors.DirectoryError
documentation: Raise this exception when an error occurs that we can not recover from.

classes.name: molgenis_emx2.directory_client.errors.ErrorReport
documentation: Summary object. Stores errors and warnings that occur during staging or publishing.

classes.name: molgenis_emx2.directory_client.transformer.Transformer

methods.name: molgenis_emx2.directory_client.transformer.Transformer.transform
documentation:
Transforms the data of a node:
1. Adds the national node code to all rows
2. Sets the withdrawn column to True for all rows of a withdrawn national nodes
3. Replaces a node's EU rows with the data from node EU's staging area
4. Sets the commercial use boolean in collections
5. Sets the quality info field for biobanks and collections
6. Adds PIDs to biobanks
7. Add biobank labels (biobank name) to collections
8. Adds the combined networks' ids to collections
9. Adds the combined qualities to collections
10. Sets the collections' categories

methods.name: molgenis_emx2.directory_client.transformer.Transformer._set_commercial_use_bool
documentation:
Takes the data of a Node and sets the commercial_use boolean of all collections
based on a set of criteria.

methods.name: molgenis_emx2.directory_client.transformer.Transformer._set_national_node_code
documentation: Adds the national node code to each row of every table of a node.

methods.name: molgenis_emx2.directory_client.transformer.Transformer._set_quality_info
documentation:
Adds the one_to_many "quality" field to the biobank and collection tables based
on the quality info tables.

methods.name: molgenis_emx2.directory_client.transformer.Transformer._set_biobank_pids
documentation: Adds the PIDs for existing biobanks.

methods.name: molgenis_emx2.directory_client.transformer.Transformer._replace_eu_rows
documentation: Replaces a node's EU networks and persons with data from the EU staging node.

methods.name: molgenis_emx2.directory_client.transformer.Transformer._set_biobank_labels
documentation:
For every collection of the Node, adds the `biobank_label` field, with the
name of its biobank

methods.name: molgenis_emx2.directory_client.transformer.Transformer._set_combined_networks
documentation:
For every collection of the Node, adds to the `combined_network` field, the
union of the networks of the collection itself and the ones of its biobank.

methods.name: molgenis_emx2.directory_client.transformer.Transformer._set_combined_qualities
documentation:
For every collection of the Node, adds to the `combined_quality` field, the
union of the qualities of the collection itself and the ones of its biobank.

methods.name: molgenis_emx2.directory_client.transformer.Transformer._set_collection_categories
documentation: Sets the 'categories' field of each collection based on the collection values.

methods.name: molgenis_emx2.directory_client.transformer.Transformer._set_withdrawn
documentation: Adds withdrawn is True to each row of every table of a node that is withdrawn

The published Directory tables have a few extra attributes that the staging tables
do not have. This class is responsible for adding those attributes so the staging
tables can be published correctly.

classes.name: molgenis_emx2.directory_client.pid_manager.PidManager

methods.name: molgenis_emx2.directory_client.pid_manager.PidManager.assign_biobank_pids
documentation:
Registers and assigns a new PID for biobanks that have an empty "pid" attribute.
Make sure to enrich the table with existing PIDs before using this method.

methods.name: molgenis_emx2.directory_client.pid_manager.PidManager.update_biobank_pids
documentation: Detects changes in biobanks and updates their PIDs accordingly.

methods.name: molgenis_emx2.directory_client.pid_manager.PidManager.terminate_biobanks
documentation: Sets the STATUS of a PID into TERMINATED.

methods.name: molgenis_emx2.directory_client.pid_manager.PidManager._register_biobank_pid
documentation:
Registers a PID for a new biobank. If one or more PIDs for this biobank already
exist, warnings will be shown.

This class is responsible for managing PIDs of BBMRI Biobank Directory entities:
assignment, updates and status changes are done here.

classes.name: molgenis_emx2.directory_client.pid_manager.NoOpPidManager
documentation: This implementation does nothing. It's used to turn off all PID features.

classes.name: molgenis_emx2.directory_client.pid_manager.PidManagerFactory
documentation:
Returns an implementation of BasePidManager based on the BasePidService that is
provided.

classes.name: molgenis_emx2.directory_client.validation.Validator
documentation:
This class is responsible for validating the data in a single node. Validation
consists of:
1. Checking the validity of all identifiers
2. Checking if there are rows that reference rows with invalid identifiers
3. Checking the validity of ages
4. Checking the validity of hyperlinks

documentation:
---
param pid_service: a configured PidService, required for publishing. When no
param session: an authenticated session with a BBMRI Biobank Directory.
---

PidService is provided, nodes can only be staged.

methods.name: molgenis_emx2.directory_client.directory.Directory.stage_external_nodes
documentation:
Stages all data from the provided external nodes in the BBMRI Biobank Directory.

Parameters:

methods.name: molgenis_emx2.directory_client.directory.Directory.publish_nodes

Publishes data from the provided nodes to the tables in the Directory.

Parameters:
    nodes (List[Node]): The list of nodes to publish
Main class for doing operations on the BBMRI Biobank Directory.

classes.name: molgenis_emx2.directory_client.publisher.Publisher

methods.name: molgenis_emx2.directory_client.publisher.Publisher.publish
documentation:
Copies staging data to the combined tables. This happens in two phases:
1. New/existing rows are upserted in the Directory tables
2. Removed rows are deleted from the Directory tables

methods.name: molgenis_emx2.directory_client.publisher.Publisher._delete_rows
documentation:
Deletes rows from a combined table that are not present in the staging area's
table. If a row is referenced from the quality info tables, it is not deleted
but a warning will be raised.

:param Table table: the staging area's table
:param Table existing_table: the existing rows

This class is responsible for copying data from the staging areas to the combined
public tables.

classes.name: molgenis_emx2.directory_client.model_fitting.ModelFitter

methods.name: molgenis_emx2.directory_client.model_fitting.ModelFitter.fit_model
documentation:
Transforms the data of a node according to the published model:
1. Merges biobank 'covid19biobank' values into 'capabilities'
2. Moves biobank and collection head information to persons

methods.name: molgenis_emx2.directory_client.model_fitting.ModelFitter._merge_covid19_capabilities
documentation:
Merges each biobank's 'covid19biobank' column into its 'capabilities' column and
then removes it.

methods.name: molgenis_emx2.directory_client.model_fitting.ModelFitter._move_heads_to_persons
documentation:
Moves the head information in the biobank and collection tables to persons and
adds the person ID to the biobank and collection tables.

methods.name: molgenis_emx2.directory_client.model_fitting.ModelFitter._move_heads_for_table
documentation:
1. Checks if the head already exists as a person
2a. If not, creates a new person
2b. If so, updates person information (f.e. add the role)
3. Fills the 'head' column with person ID
4. Removes the redundant 'head' columns.

Sometimes, model changes are implemented in the published Directory tables, but
can't be implemented yet in all staging areas because action
(adjustment of local databases, API calls, etc.) from the national nodes is needed.
This class contains temporary solutions to transform the staging areas data
according to the published model. If the models of all staging areas are equal to
the Directory model this class shouldn't contain any methods.

classes.name: molgenis_emx2.directory_client.stager.Stager

methods.name: molgenis_emx2.directory_client.stager.Stager._clear_staging_area

This class is responsible for copying data from a node with an external server to

methods.name: molgenis_emx2.directory_client.model.OntologyTable.get_matching_ontologies
documentation:
Will add matching ontologies with the specified level(s) of confidence to the

```

a list with the current ontologies

return

a list with the current ontologies extended with matching ontologies,
```

if available.

methods.name: molgenis_emx2.directory_client.model.OntologyTable.is_descendant_of_any
documentation:
Will walk from the descendant up through the parents until it finds one of the
provided ancestors, or return False if it reaches an element without a parent.
Will also return True if the descendant_id itself is in de ancestor_ids.

```
param descendant_id

the id of the descendant

param ancestor_ids

the ids of the ancestors

return

True if the descendant_id is a descendant of any of the ancestor_ids
```

documentation:
Factory method that takes a list of rows instead of an OrderedDict of
ids/rows.

Simple representation of an ontology table where the parent/child relations are
persisted with self-references.

methods.name: molgenis_emx2.directory_client.model.Node.get_id_prefix
documentation:
Each table has a specific prefix for the identifiers of its rows. This prefix is

```
param TableType table_type

the table to get the id prefix for

```

methods.name: molgenis_emx2.directory_client.model.Node.get_eu_id_prefix

```
param TableType table_type

the table to get the EU id prefix for

return

```
Represents a single national node in a BBMRI Biobank Directory.

classes.name: molgenis_emx2.directory_client.model.ExternalServerNode

classes.name: molgenis_emx2.directory_client.model.DirectoryData
documentation:
Abstract base class for containers storing rows from the six Directory tables:
persons, networks, also_known_in, biobanks, collections and facts.

classes.name: molgenis_emx2.directory_client.model.NodeData

methods.name: molgenis_emx2.directory_client.model.NodeData.convert_to_staging
documentation:
The metadata of an external node is the same as the metadata of its staging
area. This method copies an external server's NodeData and changes only the
table identifiers to point to the staging area's identifiers.
Container object storing the six tables of a single node.

classes.name: molgenis_emx2.directory_client.model.MixedData
documentation:
Container object storing the six tables with mixed origins, for example from
the combined tables or from multiple staging areas.

functions.name: molgenis_emx2.directory_client.pid_service.pyhandle_error_handler
documentation: Decorator that catches PyHandleExceptions and wraps them in a DirectoryError.

methods.name: molgenis_emx2.directory_client.pid_service.BasePidService.generate_pid
documentation:
Generates a new PID. Uses a cryptographically secure random, 12 digit
hexadecimal number separated by hyphens every 4 digits (example: 6ed7-328b-2793)
Has been tested to have <1 collisions every 10 million ids. PIDs of the
Directory are also prefixed with "1.".

classes.name: molgenis_emx2.directory_client.pid_service.PidService

methods.name: molgenis_emx2.directory_client.pid_service.PidService.from_credentials
documentation:
Factory method to create a PidService from a credentials JSON file. The
credentials file should have the following contents:

{

: "handle_server_url": "...",
  "private_key": "...",
  "certificate_only": "...",
  "client": "rest",
  "prefix": "...",
  "reverselookup_username": "...",
  "reverselookup_password": "...",
  "server_url": "..." \<- optional

}

```
param base_url

the base URL to which the PIDs will link

param credentials_json

a full path to the credentials file

return

a PidService
```

Looks for handles with this url.

```
param url

the URL to look up

raise

return

a (potentially empty) list of PIDs
```

classes.name: molgenis_emx2.directory_client.pid_service.DummyPidService
documentation:
This dummy implementation can be used to test publishing without actually
interacting with a Handle server. It will create fake PIDs.

classes.name: molgenis_emx2.directory_client.pid_service.NoOpPidService
documentation:
The NoOpPidService does completely nothing. It can be used as a feature toggle:

classes.name: molgenis_emx2.directory_client.directory_client.DirectorySession

methods.name: molgenis_emx2.directory_client.directory_client.DirectorySession.get
documentation:
Copy of the EMX2 pyclient get, with change in how list of dicts is returned
Retrieves data from a schema and returns as a list of dictionaries or as
a pandas DataFrame (as pandas is used to parse the response).

```
param schema

name of a schema

type schema

str

param query_filter

the query to filter the output

type query_filter

str

param table

the name of the table

type table

str

param as_df

if True, the response will be returned as a
pandas DataFrame. Otherwise, a recordset will be returned.

type as_df

bool

returns

list of dictionaries, status message or data frame

rtype

list | pd.DataFrame
```

methods.name: molgenis_emx2.directory_client.directory_client.DirectorySession.get_ontology
documentation:
Retrieves an ontology table.
\:param entity_type_id: the identifier of the table
\:param parent_attr: the name of the attribute that contains the parent relation
\:param matching_attrs: a list with the relevant level or levels of the

> "matching" ontology code columns

```
return

an OntologyTable
```

methods.name: molgenis_emx2.directory_client.directory_client.DirectorySession.upload_data
documentation:
Converts the six tables of a DirectoryData object to CSV, bundles them in
a ZIP archive and imports them through the import API.
\:param schema: database where data should be uploaded into
\:param data: a DirectoryData object

A session with a BBMRI Biobank Directory. Contains methods to get national nodes,
their (staging) data and quality information.

classes.name: molgenis_emx2.directory_client.directory_client.ExternalServerSession

methods.name: molgenis_emx2.directory_client.directory_client.ExternalServerSession.get_node_data
documentation:
Gets the six tables of this node's external server.

```
return

a NodeData object
```
A session with a national node's external server (for example BBMRI-NL).
